parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified. Accepts patterns, as described in .

parameters.name: fromtype
parameters.label: From Type
parameters.description: Determines which geometry by type will be converted. The default is All Types:

parameters.name: totype
parameters.label: Convert to
parameters.description: Determines what the above From Type geometry will be converted to. Conversion to Polygons is the default:

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: This option is used to select how the points of the created surface are connected.

parameters.name: lodu
parameters.label: U
parameters.description: When set to Level of Detail, controls the number of points or CVs that are used in the newly generated geometry depending on the above setting. Converting a NURBS surface into a polygon mesh with a Le

parameters.name: lodv
parameters.label: V
parameters.description: When set to Level of Detail, controls the number of points or CVs that are used in the newly generated geometry depending on the above setting. Converting a NURBS surface into a polygon mesh with a Le

parameters.name: lodtrim
parameters.label: Trim-Curve
parameters.description: The trimmed part of a surface will be converted using this Trim lod (level of detail) instead of using an implicit "1" constant.

parameters.name: divu
parameters.label: U
parameters.description: When set to Level of Detail, controls the number of points or CVs that are used in the newly generated geometry depending on the above setting. Converting a NURBS surface into a polygon mesh with a Le

parameters.name: divv
parameters.label: V
parameters.description: When set to Level of Detail, controls the number of points or CVs that are used in the newly generated geometry depending on the above setting. Converting a NURBS surface into a polygon mesh with a Le

parameters.name: divtrim
parameters.label: Trim-Curve
parameters.description: The trimmed part of a surface will be converted using this Trim lod (level of detail) instead of using an implicit "1" constant.

parameters.name: orderu
parameters.label: U Order
parameters.description: When converting to a spline type, this specifies the degree + 1 of the U or V basis function.

parameters.name: orderv
parameters.label: V Order
parameters.description: When converting to a spline type, this specifies the degree + 1 of the U or V basis function.

parameters.name: new
parameters.label: Preserve Original
parameters.description: When checked, the original geometry will be retained along with the converted geometry.

parameters.name: interphull
parameters.label: Interpolate Through Hulls
parameters.description: This option applies to the conversion between polygonal faces and grids to NURBS and Bzier surfaces and curves. When selected, the resulting curves retain the same topology as the original polygon. Wh

parameters.name: prtype
parameters.label: Particle Type
parameters.description: Selects how the particles are rendered.
